title: T-026 — DSL rule allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2 registered in 02-SETTINGS
prompt:
# T-026 — DSL rule allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2 registered in 02-SETTINGS

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §10.2, §6 D2, Appendix B feature flag
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register `allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2` rule + its v1 fallback `allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1` reference in rule_registry per §10.2; feature flag `planning.allergen_optimizer.v2.enabled` defaults false (rollout per tenant).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0081_rule_allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2.sql` upserting rule row with type='objective_component', weight=1.0, params (penalty_weight_high_risk=2.0, medium=1.0, low=0.5, segregated=999999, multi_line_cross_opt_enabled=true), lookup config (changeover_matrix), compatibility.fallback_to='allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1'.
2. Insert feature_flags row planning.allergen_optimizer.v2.enabled=false (default off).
3. Verify v1 fallback rule exists OR insert reference stub.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0081_rule_allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/rule-allergen-sequencing-optimizer.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0081 applied, when SELECT FROM rule_registry WHERE rule_id='allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2' runs, then row exists with type='objective_component' + all 5 penalty params
2. Given migration 0081 applied, when SELECT params->>'fallback_to' from that row, then value='allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1'
3. Given migration 0081 applied, when SELECT FROM feature_flags WHERE key='planning.allergen_optimizer.v2.enabled', then value=false (per Appendix B)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/rule-allergen-sequencing-optimizer.test.ts asserting rule + fallback + flag default false
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test rule-allergen-sequencing-optimizer'

## Risk red lines
- Do not enable v2 by default (must be false per Appendix B for safe rollout)
- Do not omit segregated penalty weight 999999 (effectively blocks)
- Do not couple to v1 implementation here (only registry reference)
